comment.body: So the whale condor this time he is along the 6875. I’m dictating he’s short the 6880 but that was brought back not by hand by by training so we have a 6875 long call that we know is going to stay there that will either go from whatever deal it is now to zero pushing us down unless we can get over 75 in the last15 minutes or so in which case it’ll push us up, seems to me like it’s decaying and unless some buyers come in up above than 75 probably is gonna fail
